recommendations.title: Day of the Dead
recommendations.overview: As the world is overrun by zombies, scientists and military personnel in an underground Florida bunker must decide on how they should deal with the undead.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: Zombieland
recommendations.overview: Columbus has made a habit of running from what scares him. Tallahassee doesn't have fears. If he did, he'd kick their ever-living ass. In a world overrun by zombies, these two are perfectly evolved survivors. But now, they're about to stare down the

recommendations.title: Let's Be Evil
recommendations.overview: A woman enters an underground bunker where gifted children use augmented reality technology to wreak havoc.

recommendations.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
recommendations.overview: After a catastrophic car crash, a young woman wakes up in a survivalist's underground bunker, where he claims to have saved her from an apocalyptic attack that has left the outside world uninhabitable.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Zombies
recommendations.overview: When zombies overrun San Francisco, a desperate group survives by locking themselves inside Alcatraz Prison. When the undead breach the island, our heroes are forced to return to the mainland overrun with the undead.

recommendations.title: One Cut of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Real zombies arrive and terrorize the crew of a zombie film being shot in an abandoned warehouse, said to be the site of military experiments on humans.

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: When a city is overrun with a demonically-possessed crowd, a cop must find the source of evil to save his family.

recommendations.title: The Bunker Game
recommendations.overview: Laura, 25, is an actress in a L.A.R.P. (Live Action Role Playing) Game, where the participants play the survivors of an atomic war who live underground in a sealed bunker. After several mysterious accidents, the game is interrupted and the players le

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.
